# Rehan Malik — Senior AI/ML Engineer

> 6+ years building production AI systems at enterprise scale.
> Specializing in Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, RLHF, Agentic AI, Computer Vision, Voice AI, and Cloud Architecture.

## About
- Name: Rehan Malik
- Role: Senior AI/ML Engineer
- Experience: 6+ years
- Education: M.S. Artificial Intelligence (LUMS), B.S. Computer Science (COMSATS)
- Location: United States
- Status: Open to Senior AI/ML Engineer, Staff ML Engineer, Lead AI Engineer opportunities

## Core Competencies
- Generative AI: LLM fine-tuning (LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT), RLHF (PPO, DPO), prompt engineering, function calling
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation: FAISS, ChromaDB, PG-Vector, cross-encoder re-ranking, hybrid search
- Agentic AI: Multi-agent orchestration, tool use, LangChain agents, autonomous workflows
- Computer Vision: Object detection (SAM, YOLO), image segmentation, digital avatars, OCR
- NLP: Sentiment analysis, text classification, named entity recognition, transformers (BERT, DistilBERT)
- Voice AI: Real-time speech-to-text, speaker diarization, audio streaming (Kafka, WebSockets, gRPC)
- MLOps: Model serving (VLLM, TorchServe), Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, monitoring, A/B testing
- Cloud: AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock, Lambda, ECS), Azure, GCP, Terraform

## Key Repositories
- Agentic-AI-Workflows: Production AI agents for enterprise automation — 8+ specialized agents using LangChain and OpenAI function calling
- RAG-Enterprise-Search: Enterprise RAG pipeline — knowledge retrieval across 2TB+ data with FAISS, ChromaDB, cross-encoder re-ranking
- LLM-Fine-Tuning-LoRA: Fine-tuning LLaMA-2 and Mistral with LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT — 40% cost reduction vs hosted APIs
- RLHF-LLM-Optimization: Full RLHF pipeline — SFT, reward modeling, PPO with KL divergence constraints
- Sentinel-AI-Fraud-Detection: Ensemble XGBoost + Isolation Forest fraud detection with 650+ features and SHAP explainability
- Voice-AI-Platform: Real-time voice processing — 500+ concurrent calls with Kafka, gRPC, C++/CUDA
- BiiView-Object-Detection: Meta AI SAM for object detection — 90% accuracy across 11M+ images
- Digital-People-Platform: Hyper-realistic talking avatars with SadTalker + SpeechT5 TTS
- Real-Time-Audio-Pipeline: Speech-to-text, sentiment analysis, and sales insights from live audio streams

## Professional Experience
- Senior Generative AI Engineer at MARS (10K+ employees) — $1M+ GenAI transformation
- Cloud Solution Architect at Cloud Kinetics USA — AWS, Azure, GCP enterprise solutions
- Senior ML/AI Engineer at Verticiti — RAG pipelines (2TB+), LLM fine-tuning, SAM object detection
- Senior AI Engineer at Reallytics.ai — Voice AI (500+ calls), fraud detection, autonomous agents
- Senior ML Engineer at Afiniti — Production ETL at scale, churn modeling, call routing
- AI Product Engineer at Afiniti — ML pipelines, feature engineering on millions of records
- Data Engineer at MeryCure — IoT data pipelines (1000+ devices), anomaly detection

## Kaggle Work
- 11 public notebooks covering: Agentic AI, LLM function calling, RAG, prompt engineering, multimodal AI, fraud detection, NLP, time series, ensemble methods
- 5 public datasets: tool schemas, RAG benchmarks, prompt templates, fraud features, ML design patterns
